chapters.title: One Piece
chapters.summary: 'Nerona Imu Descends' — Imu's true form is revealed for the first time: Nerona Imu, one of the First Twenty and King of the World, bearing Lunarian tanned skin, a Three-Eye tribe third eye, and Oni horns. Imu coughs up blood upon arriving in Elbaf, suggesting consequences for leaving the Holy Land. Gerd shows Zoro the heart of Saint Sommers; Zoro proposes a plan to destroy it. Next chapter 1180 expected April 19, 2026.

chapters.title: Nano Machine
chapters.summary: Battle continues as the Blade God hides like a predator, waiting to absorb cores. Yeon-Woon faces escalating threats; the confrontation between the Blade God faction and protagonists intensifies.

chapters.title: Dandadan
chapters.summary: During a group outing, Okarun suggests meeting up with Momo and Jiji. Jiji secretly channels ki through his hand into Momo to ease her chest pain, deepening the relationship dynamics between the main characters.

chapters.title: Blue Lock
chapters.summary: 'Vivian Hugo' — In a flashback two years ago, Hugo explains his grand strategy requiring a world-class striker. He finds Julian Loki, praising his talent as once-in-50-years, and Loki scores France's third goal. In the present, Loki and Hugo move in perfect sync toward center; Isagi tries to decode their strategy.

chapters.title: Sakamoto Days
chapters.summary: Gozu dies after a brief flashback showing the Al-Kamar orphans as children. Shishiba and Osaragi are rescued by Yotsumura. Natsuki Seba faces off against his own brother Kippei Saionji — an Order-level assassin — in a clash of blood and loyalty. Chapter 256 expected April 20, 2026.

chapters.title: Kingdom
chapters.summary: 'Something Reprehensible' — Bajio, Shunmen, Tajifu, and Kitari lead their armies on a rampage, overwhelming Zhao forces. Despite unit-level victories, Shun Sui Ju skillfully shifts the overall battle in Zhao's favor. Two mysterious masked figures emerge at Yo Tan Wa's headquarters, identified as members of the rare Hundred-Eyed Tribe — the 'Sages of the Mountains'.

chapters.title: Eleceed
chapters.summary: 'Beyond an Apology' — In the Awakened Academy arc's peak, Jiwoo's lightning-speed combat is pushed to its limit. The fallout from a sparring match leaves students and instructors questioning the gap in potential. Chapter 398 expected April 21, 2026.

chapters.title: Spy x Family
chapters.summary: Chapter 133 continues the biweekly serialization in Shonen Jump+. Chapter 132 ('Concern! #Spy_Family') was reviewed by fan blogs noting character relationship development. Details of Ch. 133 plot not yet fully surfaced; next chapter 134 expected April 26, 2026.

chapters.title: Omniscient Reader's Viewpoint
chapters.summary: 'Dokja's Fable Part 8' — Dokja thinks 'This is a development I know of', after which the world is destroyed and a new universe unfolds. The high-stakes conclusion to the fable arc continues.

chapters.title: Marriage Toxin
chapters.summary: Weekly serialization in Shonen Jump+ continues. The anime adaptation by Bones Film premiered April 7, 2026 (Spring 2026 season). Series has 17 tankōbon volumes in circulation.

chapters.title: WITCH WATCH
chapters.summary: 'Bone Crisis, Part 12' — Features Nico Wakatsuki, Hibana Suzaki, Mii Tsuchiya, Slump, Maverick, George (debut), and Miharu Kiryu. The intense Bone Crisis arc continues. Volume 26 scheduled for June 4, 2026.

chapters.title: One Punch Man
chapters.summary: 'Life or Death 2' — The battle escalates as heroes struggle against mounting threats in the Neo Heroes Uprising Arc. Tatsumaki continues her fight after seemingly defeating Aggregation; Flashy Flash and Tanktop Master remain in combat.

chapters.title: Chainsaw Man
chapters.summary: FINAL CHAPTER — Series concluded with Chapter 232, ending the Academy Saga (Part 2). Released March 24, 2026. Final Volume 24 releases June 4, 2026.

chapters.title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End
chapters.summary: On indefinite hiatus since October 2025 due to health concerns for creators Yamada and Abe. No confirmed return date as of April 2026.

chapters.title: Tower of God
chapters.summary: Season 3 Finale. Main series on hiatus since February 2025. Spin-off 'Urek Mazino' ongoing with Chapter 59 as of April 14, 2026.

chapters.title: Solo Leveling: Ragnarok
chapters.summary: Series on hiatus since January 7, 2026, after illustrator JIN departed for mandatory military service. Season 2 ended at Ch. 68. A new artist will take over for Season 3. Return expected May-June 2026. English Volume 1 releases July 21, 2026.

chapters.title: Jujutsu Kaisen
chapters.summary: Main series concluded with final chapter 'From Now On' on September 30, 2024. The sequel manga 'Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo' ran for 25 chapters before concluding March 8, 2026.

chapters.title: My Hero Academia
chapters.summary: Series concluded with Chapter 430 plus epilogue Chapter 431 (adapting the timeskip, later adapted to anime special airing May 2, 2026). Deku and classmates shown 8 years after graduation.

chapters.title: Kaiju No. 8
chapters.summary: Series completed with 129 chapters across 16 volumes. Anime 'Final Chapter' season by Production I.G announced December 2025 and in production.

chapters.title: Vinland Saga
chapters.summary: 'Again and Again' — Thorfinn's journey approaches its conclusion. The series is in its final stretch, with the last chapter (Ch. 220, 'Somewhere Not Here') announced for July 25, 2026, marking the end of the 20-year saga.

chapters.title: Return of the Blossoming Blade
chapters.summary: Ongoing manhwa serialization on WEBTOON (also known as Return of the Mount Hua Sect).

chapters.title: The Beginning After the End
chapters.summary: Ongoing webtoon adaptation continues. The light novel concluded in August 2025 at Chapter 529.
